description: Vital Recorder 1.16.6 is open with the file '0003.vital' from the VitalDB open dataset loaded in Track mode, showing waveform traces from a noncardiac surgery at Seoul National University Hospital. Navigate to the 'Surgery started' event marker and adjust the timeline zoom to display approximately 10-30 minutes of waveform detail around that event. The final view should clearly show individual waveform patterns, including heartbeats in the ECG and arterial pressure pulsations.
